## Meeting Purpose

[Exploratory conversation between Bridget McGillivray (new ops hire at Growth X) and Sasha Campbell (People Ops Specialist at Magical) to discuss career backgrounds, current roles, and potential future opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/suX8WJzZ_ZTntSLLGA5qgdobeejz6np8?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Sasha has a diverse ops background, currently handling people ops, finance, and various other responsibilities at Magical (43-person startup)](https://fathom.video/share/suX8WJzZ_ZTntSLLGA5qgdobeejz6np8?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Bridget recently joined Growth X as their first ops hire, looking to build out the ops team and systems from scratch](https://fathom.video/share/suX8WJzZ_ZTntSLLGA5qgdobeejz6np8?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [Both discussed current tools/systems (e.g., Rippling vs. Deal for HRIS) and challenges of generalist startup roles](https://fathom.video/share/suX8WJzZ_ZTntSLLGA5qgdobeejz6np8?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
  - [Sasha's current comp is \~105k CAD; she's open to opportunities offering growth and career progression](https://fathom.video/share/suX8WJzZ_ZTntSLLGA5qgdobeejz6np8?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)

## Topics

### Sasha's Background and Current Role

  - [Transitioned from wedding planning to tech ops during COVID](https://fathom.video/share/suX8WJzZ_ZTntSLLGA5qgdobeejz6np8?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Currently People Ops Specialist at Magical (43-person startup, grew from 21)](https://fathom.video/share/suX8WJzZ_ZTntSLLGA5qgdobeejz6np8?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [Wide-ranging responsibilities:](https://fathom.video/share/suX8WJzZ_ZTntSLLGA5qgdobeejz6np8?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
      - [People ops lead](https://fathom.video/share/suX8WJzZ_ZTntSLLGA5qgdobeejz6np8?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
      - [Accounting (A/P, A/R)](https://fathom.video/share/suX8WJzZ_ZTntSLLGA5qgdobeejz6np8?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
      - [Sales support (account setup)](https://fathom.video/share/suX8WJzZ_ZTntSLLGA5qgdobeejz6np8?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
      - [Customer support](https://fathom.video/share/suX8WJzZ_ZTntSLLGA5qgdobeejz6np8?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
      - [Marketing event planning](https://fathom.video/share/suX8WJzZ_ZTntSLLGA5qgdobeejz6np8?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
      - [Company offsites (3x/year)](https://fathom.video/share/suX8WJzZ_ZTntSLLGA5qgdobeejz6np8?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)

### Tools and Systems at Magical

  - [HRIS/Payroll: Justworks (US), Wave (Canada), Deal (international)](https://fathom.video/share/suX8WJzZ_ZTntSLLGA5qgdobeejz6np8?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [Exploring Rippling to consolidate systems](https://fathom.video/share/suX8WJzZ_ZTntSLLGA5qgdobeejz6np8?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
  - [Finance: RAMP (bill pay), Brex (reimbursements/expenses), QuickBooks (invoicing)](https://fathom.video/share/suX8WJzZ_ZTntSLLGA5qgdobeejz6np8?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
  - [Consolidating spend management onto RAMP platform](https://fathom.video/share/suX8WJzZ_ZTntSLLGA5qgdobeejz6np8?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)

### Bridget's New Role at Growth X

  - [Recently started as first ops hire](https://fathom.video/share/suX8WJzZ_ZTntSLLGA5qgdobeejz6np8?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [Focus on HR, legal, finance scope](https://fathom.video/share/suX8WJzZ_ZTntSLLGA5qgdobeejz6np8?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Currently assessing priorities and planning team structure](https://fathom.video/share/suX8WJzZ_ZTntSLLGA5qgdobeejz6np8?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
  - [Exploring HRIS options (Rippling vs. Deal)](https://fathom.video/share/suX8WJzZ_ZTntSLLGA5qgdobeejz6np8?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)

### Career Development and Feedback

  - [Sasha values growth opportunities and potential for advancement](https://fathom.video/share/suX8WJzZ_ZTntSLLGA5qgdobeejz6np8?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)
  - [Recent feedback:](https://fathom.video/share/suX8WJzZ_ZTntSLLGA5qgdobeejz6np8?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)
      - [Positive: Self-sufficient problem-solving](https://fathom.video/share/suX8WJzZ_ZTntSLLGA5qgdobeejz6np8?tab=summary&timestamp=918.0)
      - [Constructive: Needs to improve at asking for help and managing workload](https://fathom.video/share/suX8WJzZ_ZTntSLLGA5qgdobeejz6np8?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)

### Compensation and Job Market

  - [Sasha's current compensation: \~105k CAD annually](https://fathom.video/share/suX8WJzZ_ZTntSLLGA5qgdobeejz6np8?tab=summary&timestamp=1831.0)
  - [Open to new opportunities with clear growth paths](https://fathom.video/share/suX8WJzZ_ZTntSLLGA5qgdobeejz6np8?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)

### Rippling vs. Deal Comparison

  - [Rippling: More user-friendly, better UI, strong support](https://fathom.video/share/suX8WJzZ_ZTntSLLGA5qgdobeejz6np8?tab=summary&timestamp=1645.0)
  - [Deal: More manual processes, inconsistent support, potential hidden fees](https://fathom.video/share/suX8WJzZ_ZTntSLLGA5qgdobeejz6np8?tab=summary&timestamp=1658.0)
  - [Insurance costs can vary significantly between providers](https://fathom.video/share/suX8WJzZ_ZTntSLLGA5qgdobeejz6np8?tab=summary&timestamp=1799.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bridget to continue assessing Growth X's ops needs and team structure](https://fathom.video/share/suX8WJzZ_ZTntSLLGA5qgdobeejz6np8?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
  - [Both to stay in touch regarding potential future opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/suX8WJzZ_ZTntSLLGA5qgdobeejz6np8?tab=summary&timestamp=1855.0)
  - [Potentially meet for coffee if Sasha visits Vancouver](https://fathom.video/share/suX8WJzZ_ZTntSLLGA5qgdobeejz6np8?tab=summary&timestamp=1862.0)
